title: Customer Success Partner (Web3 Payments/FinTech)
description:
About Us

We are a high-growth Web3 payments company bridging traditional finance with the future of digital assets. Our payment rails, card-issuing infrastructure, and CaaS solutions empower Web2 and Web3 partners — from exchanges and wallets to fintech innovators — to move faster and smarter.

Backed by licensed financial institutions, our global team of builders from top exchanges, tech firms, and fintechs is shaping the future of compliant, scalable financial infrastructure.

📍About the Role

We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Customer Success Partner to support our DeCard business.

In this role, you will own the partner journey end-to-end, from onboarding and integration to ongoing success, by ensuring smooth, compliant, and efficient operations while driving partner adoption, transactional growth, and cardholder satisfaction.

💼What You Will Do

Key Account Success & Growth

  • Own partner satisfaction and success, proactively driving adoption and growth through cross-selling and upselling opportunities.
  • Monitor partner KPIs such as registered cardholders, KYC status, cards issued, Total Payment Volume (TPV), and Payment Success Rate (PSR).
  • Identify bottlenecks and launch marketing or promotional programs to boost card adoption and transaction volumes.
  • Maintain CRM dashboards to ensure aligned and accurate information across departments.
  • Collaborate with risk management to review alerts, flags, or suspicious activities and implement operational controls.
  • Conduct quarterly or bi-annual business reviews with key partners and prepare performance reports.
  • Manage new solutions and fee structures to optimize partner profitability.

Operation Optimization

  • Identify gaps and propose enhancements to operational workflows to improve efficiency and partner satisfaction.
  • Initiate system automation processes, test operational tools, and implement operational improvements.

🎯What You Bring

Core Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in business, finance, operations management, or related field.
  • Minimum 1 - 5 years of experience in operations, payment processing, merchant services, or fintech (experience with TPV/PSR metrics preferred).
  • Strong understanding of Web 3 payment ecosystems and general risk/compliance frameworks (KYC/AML).
  • Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and organizational skills with high attention to detail.
  • Adaptable and proactive problem-solver.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Excel/Google Sheets and operational reporting tools; able to create decks, charts, statistical models, and projection models to support business reviews and decision-making.
  • Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate effectively across internal teams and external partners.

♥️Why Join Us & Our Culture

  • Impact: Drive meaningful BD strategy and influence the growth of the next-generation Web3 payments
  • Innovation: Work on cutting-edge crypto-fiat card infrastructure used by leading Web3 companies
  • Global Exposure: Collaborate across teams in APAC, Middle East, and Europe
  • Growth: Learn fast, access strategic decision-making, and scale your career in a high-growth startup
  • Culture: A flat, collaborative, high-ownership environment where your ideas directly influence product direction.

We value people who are:

  • Builders who thrive in 0→1 and 1→100 environments
  • Owners who take initiative and move fast
  • Learners who grow through feedback and curiosity
  • Collaborators who elevate the team
  • Visionaries who care about shaping the future of stablecoin

DeCard — Product Highlight

Spend Stablecoins, Seamlessly, Anywhere
DeCard is a next-generation crypto-fiat card powered by DCS Card Centre, a MAS-licensed financial institution with 50+ years of payment expertise. Top up stablecoins and spend instantly at millions of merchants worldwide — bridging Web3 with real-world payments.

Learn more on LinkedIn Decard  & website: DCS Card Centre and DeCard

How to Apply

Excited about shaping the future of Web3 payments? Join us and redefine digital finance.

postedCompany.description: Diners Club is a premium global brand with a rich heritage as the world's first charge card and is issued today in more than 200 countries.  It is the smart payment choice for mid-to-large corporations, individual business people and professionals.
postedCompany.name: DCS CARD CENTRE PTE. LTD.
